flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cape Cod Community College fell 60% between 2006 and 2009 (22.9% → 9.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cape Cod Community College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.7k → $12.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cape Cod Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cape Cod Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
